name: I Don't Know What
description: A transparent woody enhancer built around Iso E Super — it amplifies other fragrances and skin chemistry rather than standing alone.

name: Debaser
description: Milky fig and green leaves with creamy coconut warmth.

name: Burning Barbershop
description: A smoky barbershop scent blending mint, lavender, and caramelized vanilla.

name: Bowmakers
description: Resinous woods evoking violin workshops and polished instruments.

name: Radio Bombay
description: Spiced sandalwood and cardamom drifting through jasmine smoke — a cinematic, Bollywood-radio scent that lodges itself in memory.

name: Mississippi Medicine
description: Swampy medicinal herbs over tobacco and earthy moss — the American South distilled into a bottle. Unusual and unmistakable.

name: Sundazed
description: A bright, hazy citrus with a coconut-water softness — feels like lying in the sun with your eyes closed.

name: Big Sur After Rain
description: The California coastline after rainfall — eucalyptus and sage over wet stone and cedar. Meditative and singular.
